title: oerstedella hansenii
intro: Oerstedella hansenii, also known as the Fijian orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is native to Fiji and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Oerstedella hansenii include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Oerstedella hansenii can be found in the form of supplements or extracts, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
